zh.St John The Baptist, Lewes, Sussex, Engl: 英國英格蘭素可列維斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Sackville於1520年出生在英國素可希丁格利時，她的父親John Sackville31歲，母親Lady Margaret Boleyn31歲。她於大約1541年與Sir Nicholas Pelham在英國英格蘭素可列維斯結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1595年5月10日在英國英格蘭享年75歲。

zh-hans.St John The Baptist, Lewes, Sussex, Engl: 英国英格兰素可列維斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Sackville于1520年出生在英国素可希丁格利时，她的父亲John Sackville31岁，母亲Lady Margaret Boleyn31岁。她于大约1541年与Sir Nicholas Pelham在英国英格兰素可列維斯结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1595年5月10日在英国英格兰享年75岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sackville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Sauqueville (Seine-Maritime) or Sacquenville (Eure).

variants.name: Sackwild
meanings: Jewish (Ashkenazic): from a Yiddish form sakwild, apparently meaning something like ‘game(bird), or venison, in a bag’.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Sackville was born in 1520, in Chiddingly, Sussex, England, her father, John Sackville, was 31 and her mother, Lady Margaret Boleyn, was 31. She married Sir Nicholas Pelham about 1541, in Lewes, Sussex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 10 May 1595, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Sackville est née en 1520, à Chiddingly, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, John Sackville, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Boleyn, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Nicholas Pelham environ 1541, à Lewes, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 10 mai 1595, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Sackville 1520 in Chiddingly, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Sackville 31 und ihre Mutter Lady Margaret Boleyn 31. Sie hat um 1541 in Lewes, Sussex, England, United Kingdom Sir Nicholas Pelham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 10. Mai 1595 im Alter von 75 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Sackville è nata il nel 1520 nel Chiddingly, Sussex, England, sua padre, John Sackville, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Lady Margaret Boleyn, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Sir Nicholas Pelham circa 1541, nel Lewes, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 10 maggio 1595, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 75 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Sackvilleが1520年にイギリススセックスチッドイングリーで生まれた時，父John Sackvilleは31歳，母Lady Margaret Boleynは31歳であった。約1541年にイギリスイギリススセックスルスでSir Nicholas Pelhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1595年5月10日にイギリスイギリスで75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Sackville(이)가 1520년 영국 수세스 치딩리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Sackville(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Margaret Boleyn(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 대략 1541년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 루스에서 Sir Nicholas Pelham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1595년 5월 10일 영국 잉글랜드에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Sackville nasceu em 1520, em Chiddingly, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Sackville, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret Boleyn, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Nicholas Pelham aproximadamente 1541, em Lewes, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 10 de maio de 1595, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 75 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Sackville родилась в 1520 г. в местности чиддингли, суссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени John Sackville было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Boleyn, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Nicholas Pelham около 1541 г. в местности львесь, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 10 мая 1595 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 75 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne Sackville nació en 1520, en Chiddingly, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, John Sackville, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Lady Margaret Boleyn, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Sir Nicholas Pelham aproximadamente 1541, en Lewes, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 10 de mayo de 1595, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 75 años.
